# Eng. Luciano Mori — Sr. DevOps · Cloud, AI & Security

> Personal site of Luciano Mori, a Senior DevOps Engineer based in Ottawa, Canada,
> specializing in cost-efficient AI workflows on secure cloud infrastructure
> across AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and IBM Cloud. 100+ verified Credly badges,
> Snyk × Black Hat USA 2025 speaker on DevSecOps for AI-generated code.

## Identity

- Full name: Luciano S. Mori
- Title: Senior DevOps Engineer
- Location: Ottawa, Ontario, Canada (origin: Argentina 🇦🇷)
- Focus: Cloud, AI & Cybersecurity
- Site: https://lucianomori.cloud
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucianosmori/
- GitHub: https://github.com/lucianosmori
- Credly (verified credentials): https://www.credly.com/users/luciano-s-mori/badges

## Capabilities

- **Cloud & DevOps**: Architected and deployed secure workloads across AWS, Azure, GCP, and IBM Cloud. Terraform IaC, GitHub Actions CI/CD, FinOps and autoscaling. Delivered cloud training to engineering teams.
- **AI Solutions**: Production-grade AI agents — RAG pipelines, evaluation harnesses, token & infra budgeting, agentic systems on cloud.
- **DevSecOps**: SAST, IaC scanning, supply-chain hardening for AI-generated code. Represented Snyk at Black Hat USA 2025.

## Notable

- Speaker, Snyk × Black Hat USA 2025 — "Securing AI-Generated Code from Inception to Production"
- Available for cloud & AI engagements through Q2 2026
